### Checklist

Compulsory Checklist

- [ ] I have test my changes locally
- [ ] I have run prettier formatter and fixed any formatting issues
- [ ] My changes build successfully on my local machine
- [ ] I have make sure that optional checklist is ticked whenever applicable

Optional Checklist

- [ ] My change requires database migration (How to apply changes from staging to main. eg: additional column, change column type, etc)
- [ ] My changes has added library
- [ ] I have created new API that communicates with backend (New API information)
- [ ] To merge Staging to Main
- [ ] This is a housekeeping task

If the Optional Checklist box is ticked, please add additional context in the respective section. Otherwise, remove the section. Description section is compulsory.

### Description (Compulsory)

Add your description here

### Database migration plan

- Enter your database migration plan here
- REMOVE IF NOT APPLICABLE

### New library/dependency

- List your new library
- REMOVE IF NOT APPLICABLE

### New API information

- Enter your new API information here
- REMOVE IF NOT APPLICABLE
